title: Why AI Agents Forget: Use High-Signal Context for Long Tasks
titleCandidates: Why AI Agents Forget: Use High-Signal Context for Long Tasks
Why AI Agents Lose the Goal on Long Tasks
Give AI Agents High-Signal Context for Long Tasks
thumbnailText: Why Do AI Agents Forget Long Tasks?
description:
Why can an AI Agent still forget the goal when all the information is present? Long histories, raw tool output, and stale decisions can bury the signal needed for the next step. This video shows how to manage a finite attention budget and build a reusable six-part high-signal context pack for long tasks.

What you'll learn:
- Choose high-signal instructions, tools, and canonical examples
- Retrieve detail on demand without losing the current goal
- Preserve decisions, progress, and boundaries across long tasks

Chapters:
00:00 Introduction
00:37 Attention Budget
02:19 High-Signal Inputs
03:57 Retrieve on Demand
05:29 Long-Horizon Memory
07:07 Context Pack
08:40 Summary
